# local-docs-mcp

> MCP server that indexes documentation from GitHub repos into a local SQLite FTS5 cache for fast search by AI assistants.

## Quick Start
- Create a config.json pointing to your repos and doc folders
- Run: local-docs-mcp index --config config.json
- Run: local-docs-mcp serve --config config.json
- Add to your MCP client config (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline)

## CLI Commands
- local-docs-mcp index --config <path>
- local-docs-mcp serve --config <path>
- local-docs-mcp search <query>
- local-docs-mcp list
- local-docs-mcp update --config <path> [alias]
- local-docs-mcp remove <alias>
- local-docs-mcp browse <alias> [path]

## MCP Tools
- search_docs: Full-text search with BM25 ranking
- list_repos: Show indexed repos and status
- browse_docs: Navigate doc tree structure
- update_docs: Re-index from git repos
